authority_boundary: Repo-local eval ports carry intake, suites, reports, and pressure evidence only. Central verdict, scoring, regression, proof doctrine, and central bundle adoption remain in aoa-evals.
execution_boundary: Inventory, Eval Forge, readiness, dashboard, session-start, promotion review, generated readers, and MCP consumers inspect suite execution contracts but never invoke runner.argv. Ready means source-contract-ready only. The selected repo owner or aoa-eval-apply must JIT-revalidate the contract and hashes before invoking exact argv, then capture environment metadata and an execution receipt.

canonical_owner_identity.law: PORT.yaml owner_repo and every suite/report note or execution sidecar owner_repo must match the resolved canonical repo identity, not a named worktree basename.
canonical_owner_identity.git_resolution: Use Git common-dir owner and origin repository name when available; disagreement is invalid.
canonical_owner_identity.nongit_portable_resolution: For a non-Git portable extraction, use the declared owner only when at least two recognized source manifests agree: evals/PORT.yaml, capabilities/port.manifest.json, or skills/port.manifest.json. Any disagreement is invalid.
canonical_owner_identity.nongit_fallback: Use target-root basename only when a non-Git fixture lacks two agreeing recognized owner manifests, or for an otherwise unidentified Git fixture.

ready_semantics.runner_grammar: python|python3 [-B] -m pytest [reviewed allowlisted flags] <cwd-relative-entrypoint-arg>, with only fixed -p no:cacheprovider plugin disabling; the final arg must resolve from runner.cwd to canonical repo-relative entrypoint_ref

generated_path_boundary.rule: Builders may read source from an isolated worktree, but generated dashboard and MCP runtime-status paths name the canonical owner checkout.

compatibility.consumer_rule: All Forge, dashboard, promotion, session, generated, and MCP consumers normalize v1 or unknown inventory input before routing: injected suite_execution fields map to absent and an old active-suite route maps to sidecar design. V1 must never infer runnable from suite_notes. Only v2 suite_execution is authoritative for runnable routing.
compatibility.producer_rule: The current builder emits v2 only and keeps the v1 contract file as a historical compatibility input.

summary_semantics.validator_ok: true only for a present valid port whose aggregate suite execution state is neither invalid nor stale
summary_semantics.validator_failed: count entries with structural validation issues or aggregate invalid/stale suite execution state; stale remains an active inventory status but is validator-blocked

valid_git_markers: .git file whose first line starts with gitdir:

route_recommendations.action: Do not create a local eval port unless current repo work produces real eval pressure.
route_recommendations.proof_boundary: central proof adoption, verdicts, scoring, regression, and proof doctrine stay in aoa-evals

route_recommendations.action: Inspect the existing eval-like surface before mutation; add a valid port only if current pressure warrants it.
route_recommendations.proof_boundary: central proof adoption, verdicts, scoring, regression, and proof doctrine stay in aoa-evals

route_recommendations.action: Repair the local eval-port shape and rerun the validator before applying or designing evals.
route_recommendations.proof_boundary: central proof adoption, verdicts, scoring, regression, and proof doctrine stay in aoa-evals

route_recommendations.action: Repair the local eval-port shape and rerun the validator before applying or designing evals.
route_recommendations.proof_boundary: central proof adoption, verdicts, scoring, regression, and proof doctrine stay in aoa-evals

route_recommendations.action: Repair the local suite execution sidecar, canonical owner, schema, paths, typed python_pytest argv grammar, or authority/runtime-boundary flags before any owner-local invocation.
route_recommendations.proof_boundary: inventory and routing surfaces never execute runner.argv; central proof authority stays in aoa-evals

route_recommendations.action: Review changed tracked sources and refresh approved SHA256 values before any owner-local invocation.
route_recommendations.proof_boundary: stale contracts are not runnable and hash refresh is not proof acceptance

route_recommendations.action: Local pressure overlaps central eval names; inspect and apply the existing central route before designing a new local suite.
route_recommendations.proof_boundary: central proof adoption, verdicts, scoring, regression, and proof doctrine stay in aoa-evals

route_recommendations.action: Keep the valid skeleton dormant until a current task creates local eval pressure.
route_recommendations.proof_boundary: central proof adoption, verdicts, scoring, regression, and proof doctrine stay in aoa-evals

route_recommendations.action: Review the local draft bundle against central aoa-evals routes before any adoption or normalization.
route_recommendations.proof_boundary: central proof adoption, verdicts, scoring, regression, and proof doctrine stay in aoa-evals

route_recommendations.action: A source-contract-ready local suite may be invoked only by the repo owner or aoa-eval-apply after JIT revalidation, using exact argv and timeout, with environment capture and an execution receipt.
route_recommendations.proof_boundary: ready does not prove pinned dependencies or reproducible runtime and remains owner-local support, not central proof, scoring, or verdict authority

route_recommendations.action: Treat the suite note as design pressure only; add a reviewed execution sidecar before claiming a runnable local suite.
route_recommendations.proof_boundary: a .suite.md note alone is not runnable and carries no central proof authority

route_recommendations.action: Select existing local and central eval routes first, then apply or design only after duplicate-fit review.
route_recommendations.proof_boundary: central proof adoption, verdicts, scoring, regression, and proof doctrine stay in aoa-evals

route_recommendations.action: Treat reports-only pressure as a candidate for suite extraction or central review, not proof acceptance.
route_recommendations.proof_boundary: central proof adoption, verdicts, scoring, regression, and proof doctrine stay in aoa-evals

route_recommendations.action: Declared active state has no detected pressure files; repair status or add the missing reviewed pressure surface.
route_recommendations.proof_boundary: central proof adoption, verdicts, scoring, regression, and proof doctrine stay in aoa-evals

contract_limits: inventory is routing evidence, not central proof acceptance
route recommendations do not approve proposals or accept evidence
inventory, Eval Forge, readiness, dashboard, session-start, promotion review, generated readers, and MCP never execute runner.argv
ready proves reviewed source-contract shape and freshness only, not interpreter or dependency reproducibility
owner/apply must JIT-revalidate and capture environment plus an execution receipt
MCP and generated readers remain weaker than source ports and aoa-evals source bundles
